prompt:
A compact flip-top pack of litmus-style pH test strips on a hydroponics bench, with a few strips fanned out beside a small sample vial of nutrient solution. One strip shows a clear gradient of color blocks (no readable numbers) to imply a 4–9 pH range, and a small dropper pipette rests nearby to make the testing process visually obvious.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a clean near-future hydroponics aesthetic: soft cinematic lighting, realistic paper strip texture and color, no brand logos, and no readable text. Keep the pack and strips centered and uncluttered so it reads instantly as a pH test strip kit.
